features: 【Package Inclusion】: You will receive 42 pieces of candy-color hair bobbles in 7colors—purple, yellow, green, blue, pink, orange, and magenta—with 6 pieces for each color. The sufficient quantity of hair bubbles for girls can meet your daily use and sharing needs

【Quality Material】: These hair bubbles for girls are made of plastic and polyester, which have elasticity and wear resistance. This quality material combination makes the hair bobbles reusable, and the hair ties for girls will not cause harm to your hair and scalp even with long-term use

【Multi-Color Design】: The hair bubbles for girls feature a lovely candy-color design, which is vivid and eye-catching. The rich color options hair bubbles allow you to match different outfits, hairstyles, and moods, making your daily look more diverse and charming

【Comfortable to Wear】: Designed with user comfort in mind, these hair bubbles for girls have excellent elasticity. The total length of hair ties for girls is 15cm (5.91inch), and it can be stretched up to 30cm (11.81inch). When removing, the hair bobbles for girls can be easily slipped off without tugging or causing discomfort to your hair or scalp

【Wide Uses】: These hair bubbles for girls are perfect for daily hairstyling, such as tying ponytails, braids, or half-up hairstyles. The hair ties for girls are also ideal for daily commuting, school, birthday parties, holiday gatherings, performances, and proms, add a touch of sweetness to any occasion
description: Features:​ These 42pcs candy-color hair bobbles are designed with 7 vivid hues (purple, yellow, green, blue, pink, orange, magenta) that add a playful and sweet touch to girls’ hairstyles. Made of plastic and polyester, the hair bubbles for girls are durable—resistant to breaking or deformation—while the polyester component gives the ball hair ties excellent elasticity, allowing them to stretch up to 30cm without losing shape. The hair bubbles glide smoothly onto hair for a secure hold, and can be easily removed without tugging, ensuring no harm to hair or scalp. The reusable design meets long-term daily use and sharing needs with friends and family.​ Specifications:​ Material: 70% plastic + 30% polyester​ Color: Purple, yellow, green, blue, pink, orange, magenta (6 pieces per color)​ Size: Beads 1.5cm (0.59inch); total length 15cm (5.91inch); stretchable up to 30cm (11.81inch)​ Package Includes: 42pcs candy-color ponytail double-headed ball hair ties​
